name: Product Track Separation Violation Count
description: Counts detected violations where children's education and mature fiction content tracks are mixed without approved exception.
goalMapping: Protects audience safety and trust by enforcing strict domain separation boundaries.

escalation_policy.on_critical: Immediately block affected workflows and route to human-in-loop risk resolution.
escalation_policy.on_warning: Run compliance audit and require explicit director-level exception handling.
